principalInvestigator.name: Professor XXX
principalInvestigator.title: Principal Investigator
principalInvestigator.biography: Professor XXX leads the Tsinghua Clinical Psychology Lab. Their research focuses on clinical psychology, mental health, and evidence-based psychological interventions.

graduateCandidates.name: Graduate Student A
graduateCandidates.bio: Graduate Student A studies clinical assessment, symptom trajectories, and intervention outcomes.

graduateCandidates.name: Graduate Student B
graduateCandidates.bio: Graduate Student B focuses on digital mental health tools and scalable psychological interventions.

graduateCandidates.name: Graduate Student C
graduateCandidates.bio: Graduate Student C investigates cognitive and emotional processes related to mental health.

graduateCandidates.name: Graduate Student D
graduateCandidates.bio: Graduate Student D is interested in psychotherapy process research and public mental health.

alumni.name: Alumnus A
alumni.description: Alumnus A continues research on assessment and intervention in clinical psychology.

alumni.name: Alumnus B
alumni.description: Alumnus B works on community mental health and evidence-based service delivery.

alumni.name: Alumnus C

alumni.name: Alumnus D
alumni.description: Alumnus D focuses on mental health education and prevention programs.
